session_guidance.token_note: Safe window — generate token once, reuse all day until logout.
session_guidance.request_token_note: request_token is single-use and expires in ~2 minutes. Never call generate_session on every restart — store access_token in .env.
session_guidance.login_order_tip: For Kite Web + API same day: log in via generate_token.py first, then open Kite Web in the same browser (or tick 'Login to Kite Web also').
session_guidance.postback_note: Postback URL needs HTTPS (ngrok for local). WebSocket order updates are enabled in this app when WS is on.
session_guidance.instruments_note: Refresh instrument master (NFO/BFO) each trading morning before 09:15.

faq_checklist: Access token: generate once per day after 07:35 IST; reuse from .env
Request token: single-use ~2 min — do not re-exchange on every app restart
Postback URL: optional locally; use WS order updates or HTTPS tunnel
TokenException (403): session expired — run generate_token.py, do not trade
Instruments dump: refresh NFO/BFO each session (api.kite.trade/instruments)
Quote API: max 1 req/sec | Historical: 3 req/sec | Orders: 10 req/sec
WebSocket: up to 3000 instruments × 3 connections per API key
Order updates via WS may arrive out of sequence — reconcile with orders()
